title: STATUS 2700W Miami Steam Iron, Ceramic Soleplate Clothes Iron, Continuous and Burst Steam, White and Purple for Home Laundry (MIAMIIRON1PKB4)
availability_text: Only 6 left in stock (more on the way).
features: POWERFUL 2700W FAST HEAT Ceramic soleplate reaches ironing temperature in under thirty seconds, pumping continuous vapour through multiple jets so deep creases drop out of cotton, denim and bedding before the wash basket is empty.

VARIABLE STEAM CONTROL Slide selector delivers up to forty grams per minute for everyday shirts, while a ninety gram shot flattens stubborn pleats in linen curtains and heavy jeans, letting you move from silk to denim with one appliance.

CERAMIC NON STICK GLIDE Pearl coated plate skims over sequins, buttons and embroidery, resists scratches from zips and wipes clean with a damp cloth, keeping garments fresh and free from the scorched marks left by bare metal bases.

VERTICAL REFRESH OPTION Upright burst freshens hanging jackets, upholstery and holiday drapes directly on the hanger, perfect when wardrobe space is tight or for fast hotel touch ups before an evening meal or business meeting.

SAFETY AND EASY FILL Auto shut off cuts power if the iron is left flat or tipped, one point eight metre swivel cable prevents tangles and the three hundred millilitre tank fills through a wide mouth that stops drips on carpets and boards.
description: Product Description Tackle laundry piles with speed and confidence using the STATUS Miami Steam Iron. Drawing 2700W, the ceramic soleplate heats in moments, then maintains even temperature while channels feed up to forty grams per minute of steady steam. A fingertip trigger releases a ninety gram burst for obstinate creases, and the same jet works vertically to revitalise curtains or suits without an ironing board. The pearl ceramic surface glides smoothly across delicate silks, tough denim and everything between, and it cleans easily so marks never transfer to fresh fabric. An adjustable thermostat pairs with variable steam to match any fibre, while built in overheat and tip sensors shut the unit down automatically for peace of mind. Fill the generous three hundred millilitre tank through the wide front spout, set the control wheel and let the iron erase wrinkles silently and efficiently. Lightweight yet powerful, the STATUS Miami brings professional results to household chores, student flats and holiday cottages alike. Box Contains 1 x Status Miami 2700w Steam Iron

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Continuous Steam, Burst of Steam, Dry/Steam/Spray Functions, Anti-Drip
